name: Bahe (Bah-Hee) A 'ferocious beast' in the wild.
description:
Bahe came from the tribe called Lightning Clan. The name mainly just came from their quick reflexes and speed.. She grew up strong, agile, and high capability. She had beat most men in her tribe when it came to hunting. It was basically second nature to her. It was time for her to find a mate when she turned 22 but none of the males interested her. Not because they weren't strong, but they were too insensitive and insecure because of how strong and quick she was compared to them so they treated her differently.

As the years went by and it was the same rejection over rejection, she decided to leave the tribe and live her own way. There was no ill will but she didn't want to be around those couples and be the only one left out. She still keeps tabs with her village by sending them some resources like furs she hunted or meats. She just wants a mate she can take care of instead of the other way around.

She's naked BTW. I didn't know what the hell its called that shes wearing and I had no idea how to look it up so I just left it out besides that she has beads wrapped around her limbs.
